summary: Round552 was a local pre-question-bank workbench UI polish under the then-active Round551 runtime. Round554 supersedes its runtime/proof-depth counters while retaining the compact status strip and no-overclaim answer boundary.

appliedPrinciples: subtle borders instead of heavy decorative effects
compact workbench controls before deep content

corePreviewDeploy.reason: Wrangler reached Cloudflare HTTPS connections but did not progress beyond the CLI banner in the current network/API session.

acceptance: The question-bank home first screen starts with a compact status strip; current counters are owned by the active runtime, now Round554.
The hero keeps 181103, real exam, formula, and proof-depth routes visible without a large blank lead-in.
The page still states that strict original-answer PDF proof remains zero.
No production/live claim is made until authenticated QA passes after a successful Pages deploy.
